page.title: Getting Started with Consumer Wallet
page.subtitle: Everything you need to download, install, and set up your mPay Consumer Wallet. Follow this step-by-step guide to start making fast, secure payments in minutes.

requirements.heading: System Requirements
requirements.intro: Before downloading, make sure your device meets the minimum requirements:

ios.name: iOS
ios.desc: iOS 15.0 or later. Compatible with iPhone 8 and newer. Approximately 85 MB of storage required.

android.name: Android
android.desc: Android 10.0 (API level 29) or later. Approximately 60 MB of storage required.

requirements.nfc_callout_body: For tap-to-pay functionality, your device must have NFC hardware. Most modern smartphones (iPhone 7+ and Android with NFC) support this feature.

download.heading: Download & Install
download.intro: mPay Consumer Wallet is available for free on both major app stores. Choose your platform below:

1.title: Open your app store
1.content: Open the App Store (iOS) or Google Play Store (Android) on your device.

2.title: Search for mPay Wallet
2.content: Type mPay Consumer Wallet in the search bar. Look for the official app with the mPay logo and "mPay Network" as the developer.

3.title: Download and install
3.content: Tap Get (iOS) or Install (Android). The app will download and install automatically. You may be asked to authenticate with your device password, Face ID, or fingerprint.

4.title: Open the app
4.content: Once installed, tap Open or find the mPay icon on your home screen. The app will launch with the welcome screen.

download.verify_callout_body: Always verify that the developer is listed as "mPay Network" before downloading. Do not install apps from unofficial sources.

signup.heading: Sign Up
signup.intro: Creating your mPay account is quick and straightforward. You'll need a valid phone number and email address.

1.title: Are you an existing mPay Customer?
1.content: On the welcome screen, you will be prompted to select whether you "Are an existing customer?". For new customers, tap the NO button. If you already have an account, select YES button instead.

2.title: Enroll New Consumer Form
2.content: User is taken to Enroll New Consumer form.

3.title: Required Customer Information
3.content: The User ID, E-mail Address, and Mobile Number should be unique for each customer.
3.info_callout: During enrollment submission, the system verifies whether the User ID, E-mail Address and Mobile Number is already in use by existing mPay customers.

4.title: Fill in all required fields
4.field_name: First and Last Name — As it appears on your ID
4.field_email: Email Address — A valid email for notifications and recovery
4.field_mobile: Mobile Number — Should be a valid mobile number that will receive SMS for verification
4.field_referral: Referral Code — Optional field for the referral code of the referring mPay customer.

5.title: Agree to terms
5.intro: There are two required checkboxes to accept prior to proceeding with enrollment:
5.check_security: Security Policy that only one user is allowed per device which states: "I agree that enrolling a new customer will remove the existing account linked on this device."

6.title: Option to Use Email and Mobile in Merchant App
6.intro: Choose whether your email and mobile number can also be used to identify you in the Merchant App.
6.check_security: Security Policy that only one user is allowed per device which states: "I agree that enrolling a new customer will remove the existing account linked on this device."

signup.success_callout_body: Once you see the confirmation screen, your account is ready. You can now proceed to set up your profile and configure your wallet.

first_login.heading: First Login & Setup
first_login.intro: After creating your account, you'll be guided through the initial setup wizard. Here's what to expect:

1.title: Add your personal details
1.content: Enter your full name as it appears on your government-issued ID. Optionally, add a profile photo for easy identification during P2P transfers.

2.title: Set up security
2.pin: PIN Code — Set a 6-digit PIN for quick access
2.biometric: Biometric — Enable Face ID or fingerprint authentication
2.recommend: We recommend enabling both for maximum security

3.title: Enable notifications
3.content_pre: Allow push notifications to receive instant payment confirmations, security alerts, and promotional offers. You can customize notification preferences later in

1.title: Personalize your profile
1.content: Set a profile picture for your wallet account.

2.title: Managing Notification Preferences
2.content: You can turn on/off a notification option, based on your own preferences.

3.title: Complete the setup
3.content: Tap Finish Setup to land on your wallet dashboard. You're ready to start making payments!

first_login.tip_callout_body: Verification process may take 24 to 48 hours, it is advisable to complete the profile as soon as possible in order to gain full access to mPay Wallet features.

screenshots.heading: Setup Walkthrough
screenshots.intro: Here's a visual overview of the key screens you'll encounter during setup:

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I use mPay Wallet on multiple devices?
faq.a1: Yes, you can sign in to your mPay account on multiple devices. However, for security reasons, only one device can be active at a time. Signing in on a new device will automatically sign you out of the previous one.
faq.q2: What if I don't receive the OTP code?
faq.a2: If you don't receive the OTP within 60 seconds, tap the "Resend Code" button. Make sure your phone has signal reception and SMS is not blocked. If the issue persists, try the "Call Me" option for voice verification. Check our Troubleshooting guide for more solutions.
faq.q3: Is there a minimum deposit to start using the wallet?
faq.a3: No, there is no minimum deposit required. You can create your account and explore the app without adding any funds. When you're ready to make a payment, you can fund your wallet with any amount. Check Wallet Management for funding options and limits.
faq.q4: Can I change my phone number after registration?
faq.a4: Yes, you can update your phone number from the Settings page. You'll need to verify your identity and the new phone number via OTP. The old number will be unlinked after successful verification. For security, there's a 24-hour cooling period before certain features are re-enabled after a number change.
faq.q5: What should I do if the app crashes during setup?
faq.a5: If the app crashes during setup, simply reopen it. Your progress is saved automatically at each step. If the problem persists, try clearing the app cache (Android) or reinstalling the app (iOS). Make sure you have the latest version installed. Visit our Troubleshooting page for more help.
faq.q6: Is my personal data secure during registration?
faq.a6: Absolutely. All data transmitted during registration is encrypted using industry-standard TLS 1.3. Your personal information is stored securely and never shared with third parties without your consent. Read our Privacy Policy for complete details on how we handle your data.

home.title: Consumer Wallet Documentation

overview.p1: Welcome to the MPay Network Consumer Wallet documentation. The Consumer Wallet is your all-in-one mobile payment solution, enabling you to make fast, secure payments at any MPay-enabled merchant, send money to friends and family, and manage your finances with ease.
overview.p2: Whether you're paying at a coffee shop via QR code, tapping your phone for an NFC payment, or sending money to a friend across the country, the Consumer Wallet has you covered. This documentation will guide you through everything from your first download to advanced features.

quick_start.heading: Quick Start
quick_start.intro: Get up and running with MPay Consumer Wallet in just a few steps:

step1.title: Download & Install
step1.description: Get the MPay Consumer Wallet from the App Store or Google Play Store.

step2.title: Create Your Account
step2.description: Sign up with your phone number and complete the quick verification process.

step3.title: Fund Your Wallet
step3.description: Add money to your wallet via bank transfer, debit card, or other supported methods.

step4.title: Start Paying
step4.description: Scan a QR code or tap your phone at any MPay-enabled merchant to pay instantly.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.description: Download, install, and set up your Consumer Wallet. Complete your first login and explore the app interface.

account_setup.title: Account Setup
account_setup.description: Register your account, complete identity verification, and customize your personal profile settings.

making_payments.title: Making Payments

p2p_transfers.title: P2P Transfers

troubleshooting.description: Find solutions to common issues, error codes, payment failures, and get help when something doesn't work as expected.

account_setup.title: Account Setup & Verification
account_setup.subtitle: Learn how to register your mPay Consumer Wallet account, complete identity verification and configure your profile preferences.

registration.heading: Registration
registration.intro: Creating your mPay Consumer Wallet account is quick and straightforward. All you need is a valid phone number to get started.
registration.intro_2: Your mobile number and e-mail address serve as one of the unique identifier in the mPay Network. Follow these steps to register or sign up:

1.title: Are you an existing mPay Customer?
1.content: On the welcome screen, you will be prompted to select whether you "Are an existing customer?". For new customers, tap the NO button. If you already have an account, select YES button instead.

2.title: Enroll New Customer Form
2.content: User is taken to Enroll New Consumer form.

3.title: Required Customer Information
3.content: The User ID , E-mail Address , and Mobile Number should be unique for each customers.

4.title: Create Your PIN
4.content: Set a 6-digit PIN that you'll use to authorize transactions and access your wallet. Choose something secure but memorable.

5.title: Accept Terms of Service
5.content_pre: Review and accept the mPay Network

6.title: Security Questions setup
6.content: Setup security question, which will be used for account recovery and password reset. Click on Submit button

7.title: OTP Verification
7.content: An SMS will be sent to your registered mobile number with OTP(One-Time PIN).
7.ensure: Ensure to verify the correct OTP.
7.success: Success message will be displayed that Registration is successful, tap OK button.

8.title: PIN Configuration
8.content: Customer is required to setup a PIN for the wallet application.
8.pin_def: PIN acts as your application's secure passcode.
8.pin_req: Users are required to enter their PIN each time they log in to verify their identity and access the application.

9.title: Biometrics Setup for Login
9.content: Customer can also use biometrics data to sign in to the wallet application as an added layer of security.
9.default: If biometrics is setup, we use Face ID or Touch ID to sign in to the wallet application by default.

registration.security_tip_body: It is recommended to keep both security measures enabled to ensure stronger protection for your wallet application.
registration.supported_regions_intro: mPay Consumer Wallet is currently available in the following regions:
registration.voip_warning_body: Virtual phone numbers (Google Voice, Skype, etc.) are not accepted for registration. You must use a mobile carrier number.

verification.heading: Identity Verification
verification.intro: mPay needs to verify its customer's identity to prevent fraud. Please refer below to learn more about customer's profile status:
verification.how_to_intro: After a successful registration, login to your mPay Wallet application to Complete the Profile by uploading pertinent identification documents.

1.title: Enter address details and other required information
1.content: Make sure the address matched with the government-issued ID to be submitted in the verification process.

2.title: Upload Government-Issued ID
2.content: Take a clear photo of your valid government-issued identification. Supported documents include passports, national ID cards, and driver's licenses.

3.title: Take a photo for your profile picture
3.content: Take a live selfie for facial comparison. Our system matches your face against your ID photo. Ensure good lighting and remove accessories like sunglasses.

4.title: Wait for Review
4.content: mPay Network will carefully review all customer's details and may take 24 to 48 hours for verification process to complete. Whatever the result of the verification process, customer will be verified via SMS and email.

table.row1_name: Government ID (Passport / National ID / Driver's License)

verification.data_secure_body: All documents are encrypted end-to-end and processed by our certified KYC partner. We never store raw images after verification is complete. See our Privacy Policy for details.
verification.status_intro: You can check your current verification status at any time:

status_list.1: Open the mPay app and login.
status_list.2: Depending on the customer's status, user will receive message after login:

verification.verified_status: Verified — You can access the app functionalities. During the first time login after account has been verified, you will get a message "Congratulations! Your account has been fully verified!"
verification.pending_status: Pending — Under review and will display a message that "Your account is still under review."
verification.rejected_status: Rejected — customer will see a message There's a problem with your account, please contact support@mpaynetwork.com for more details.

profile.heading: Profile Configuration
profile.intro: Customize your mPay profile so that friends and merchants can easily identify you during transactions.

name.title: Full Name
name.content: The name shown to others during transactions. Can be your real name or a nickname.

photo.title: Profile Photo
photo.content: Upload a photo or take a new one. Optional but recommended for P2P transfers.

email.title: Email Address
email.content: Used for transaction receipts and account recovery. Strongly recommended.

language.title: Preferred Language
language.content: Set your display language. Currently supports English, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese.

qr.title: QR Profile
qr.content: Your profile QR to use in receiving money to your wallet account.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.content: Configure push notifications, email alerts, and SMS for payment and security events.

edit_steps.2: 2. Tap the profile icon in the top-right corner (or navigate to Settings → Profile)
edit_steps.3: 3. Tap the "Edit" button next to the field you want to change

profile.phone_change_title: Changing your phone number is subject for mPay Network's approval and verification
profile.phone_change_body: Call the mPay hotline or send an e-mail to support@mpaynetwork.com.
profile.security_intro: During account setup, we strongly recommend configuring these security features:

security_list.biometric: Biometric Authentication: Enable fingerprint or Face ID for quick, secure access
security_list.pin: Transaction PIN: Your 6-digit PIN is required for all transactions — never share it with anyone

profile.never_share_title: Never share your PIN or OTP codes
profile.never_share_body: mPay will never ask for your PIN or OTP via phone, email, or chat. Anyone requesting these is attempting fraud. Report suspicious activity immediately through the app.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I register with a phone number from a different country?
faq.a1: Yes, you can register with any supported country code. However, some features may be limited based on your registration region. Transaction limits and available features may vary by country due to local regulations.
faq.q2: How long does identity verification take?
faq.a2: Tier 2 (Standard) verification is automated and typically completes within 5 minutes. Tier 3 (Premium) verification may require manual review and can take up to 48 business hours. You'll receive a push notification when the review is complete.
faq.q3: What happens if my verification is rejected?
faq.a3: If your verification is rejected, you'll receive a notification with the specific reason (e.g., blurry photo, expired document, name mismatch). You can re-submit your documents from Settings → Account → Verification. There is no limit to re-submission attempts, but repeated failures may trigger a temporary cooldown period.
faq.q4: Can I change my display name after registration?
faq.a4: Yes, you can change your display name at any time from Settings → Profile → Edit Profile. Note that if you've completed Tier 2 or Tier 3 verification, your legal name on file cannot be changed without re-verification. Your display name (shown to other users) is separate from your legal name.
faq.q5: I didn't receive the OTP code. What should I do?
faq.a5: Wait at least 60 seconds, then tap "Resend Code". If you still don't receive it: (1) ensure your phone has signal, (2) check that your number is correct, (3) check your spam/blocked messages folder, (4) try restarting your phone. If the issue persists, visit our Troubleshooting page.
faq.q6: Is my personal data safe during verification?
faq.a6: Absolutely. All documents are transmitted using end-to-end encryption (AES-256). Our KYC verification is handled by a certified, SOC 2 Type II compliant partner. Raw document images are deleted after verification is complete. Only the verification result and a hash are stored. Read more in our Privacy Policy.

making_payments.title: Making Payments
making_payments.subtitle: Learn how to make fast, secure payments using the MPay Consumer Wallet. Whether scanning a QR code, showing yours, or tapping with NFC — paying has never been easier.

qr.title: QR Code Payments
qr.body: Scan or show a QR code to complete payments instantly at any MPay merchant.

nfc.title: NFC Tap-to-Pay
nfc.body: Simply hold your phone near the terminal for a contactless payment experience.

scan_qr.heading: Scanning QR Codes
scan_qr.intro: The most common way to pay is by scanning a merchant's QR code. This process takes only a few seconds and securely processes your payment through the MPay network.
scan_qr.how_to_title: How to do a Scan to Pay
scan_qr.how_to_intro: Scan to Pay allows users to scan a QR code to quickly send money or make payments using their wallet.

1.title: Tap "Scan to Pay"
1.body: From the home screen, tap the Scan to Pay icon in the Send Money section.

2.title: Scan the Recipient's QR Code
2.body: Point your camera at the recipient's QR code. Once scanned, the recipient's details will automatically populated in Scan to Pay form.

3.title: Enter Amount and Confirm
3.body: Enter the transfer amount, review the details, and confirm with your PIN or biometric authentication.

4.title: Transfer Complete
4.body:
You'll see a confirmation screen with a transaction reference number. 

The recipient is notified instantly.

scan_qr.tip_body: You can also launch the QR scanner directly by double-tapping the MPay icon on your home screen, or by using the "Scan" shortcut from the notification shade widget.

show_qr.heading: Generating QR to Pay
show_qr.intro: Some merchants prefer to scan your QR code using their terminal or device. In this case, you simply present your personal payment QR code for them to scan.

1.title: Open Your Payment Code
1.body: Tap "Pay" on the home screen, then select "Show My QR Code". Your personal payment QR code will be displayed.

2.title: Present to Merchant
2.body: Hold your phone steady with the QR code visible. The merchant will scan it using their MPay Merchant terminal or device camera.

3.title: Confirm on Your Device
3.body: After the merchant scans and enters the amount, you'll receive a push notification. Confirm the payment amount and authenticate to complete.

show_qr.security_body: Your payment QR code refreshes every 60 seconds for security. Never share a screenshot of your QR code. Only show it at the point of sale when making a payment.

nfc_tap.heading: NFC Tap-to-Pay
nfc_tap.intro: If your device supports NFC and the merchant has an NFC-enabled terminal, you can pay by simply tapping your phone against their payment device — no scanning needed.

1.title: Enable NFC
1.body: Ensure NFC is enabled in your phone settings and in the MPay app under Settings → Payment Methods → NFC Payments.

2.title: Hold Near Terminal
2.body: When the merchant's terminal shows the amount, hold the back of your phone (near the NFC antenna) within 4cm of the payment terminal.

3.title: Authenticate
3.body: A vibration or tone confirms the connection. Authenticate using biometrics or your PIN. The payment processes in under 2 seconds.

4.title: Payment Complete
4.body: You'll see a success checkmark and receive both an in-app notification and optional SMS receipt.

nfc_tap.antenna_body: The NFC antenna is usually located at the top-center of the back of your phone. Remove thick phone cases if you're having trouble connecting.

confirmation.heading: Payment Confirmation
confirmation.intro: After every successful payment, you'll receive an instant confirmation with transaction details. This serves as your digital receipt.
confirmation.receipt_intro: Every payment confirmation includes the following details:
confirmation.share_body: Tap the "Share" button on any receipt to send it via email, messaging apps, or save as a PDF.
confirmation.failed_intro: If a payment fails or remains pending, you'll see a different status screen:

failed_list.pending: Pending: The payment is being processed. This usually resolves within 30 seconds.
failed_list.failed: Failed: The payment could not be completed. Check your balance and connection.
failed_list.refunded: Refunded: The merchant initiated a refund. Funds return within 1-3 business days.

history.heading: Transaction History
history.intro: Track all your past payments in one place. Your transaction history keeps a complete record of every payment through the mPay Wallet.
history.access_body: Navigate to Home → Transactions or swipe up on the home screen.
history.export_body: You can export your transaction history as CSV or PDF by tapping the "Export" button.

overview.intro: Here's a visual walkthrough of the complete payment process from start to finish.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What's the maximum amount I can pay per transaction?
faq.a1: The default transaction limit is $5,000 per payment. Verified accounts (KYC Level 2) can request higher limits. You can manage your limits in Settings → Payment Limits.
faq.q2: Can I pay without an internet connection?
faq.a2: NFC payments can work in offline mode for small transactions (under $50) if configured. QR code payments always require an internet connection.
faq.q3: What should I do if the QR scanner doesn't recognize the code?
faq.a3: Ensure adequate lighting and clean your lens. If it fails, ask for a fresh code or enter the merchant ID manually.
faq.q4: Is NFC payment supported on all devices?
faq.a4: NFC payments require a device with an NFC chip. Most phones after 2018 and iPhones from 7 onwards support NFC.
faq.q5: Are there any fees for making payments?
faq.a5: MPay Consumer Wallet does not charge any fees for making payments to merchants. The processor handles fees.
faq.q6: Can I cancel a payment after it's been sent?
faq.a6: Completed payments cannot be cancelled directly. Contact the merchant for a refund or report a dispute in Transactions.

wallet_management.title: Wallet Management
wallet_management.subtitle: Learn how to check your balance, add funds, withdraw money, and understand your transaction limits.

overview.title: Your MPay Wallet
overview.body: Your mPay wallet is a secure digital wallet that stores your funds and allows you to make payments, transfer money, and manage your finances — all from your smartphone.

balance.heading: Checking Your Balance
balance.intro: Your wallet balance is always visible on the home screen of the mPay app. Here's everything you need to know about viewing and understanding your balance.

1.title: Open the MPay App
1.desc: Launch the mPay Consumer app on your device. Your balance appears prominently on the home screen.

2.title: View Available Balance
2.desc: Your available balance is displayed at the top of the screen. This is the amount you can spend or transfer immediately.

3.title: Toggle Balance Visibility
3.desc: Tap the eye icon to hide or show your balance for privacy when in public.

balance.callout: Pending transactions may temporarily reduce your available balance. Pending amounts are shown separately below your main balance.

topup.heading: Top-Up Methods
topup.intro: Add funds to your MPay wallet using any of the following methods. Each method has different processing times and fees.

bank.title: Bank Transfer
bank.desc: Transfer funds from any local banks to your mPay wallet account via Instant Payment processing. Safe and fast.

wallet.title: Wallet to Wallet
wallet.desc: Instantly load your wallet account by asking another mPay customer to send you money and pay them cash.

agent.title: Cash Agent
agent.desc: Visit an authorized mPay merchant near you to deposit cash into your wallet. Present your mPay QR code to the merchant.

withdraw.heading: Withdrawals
withdraw.intro: Withdraw funds from your wallet to your linked bank account. MPay supports instant withdrawals to major local banks.
withdraw.callout: Important: mPay adheres to Curaçao Central Bank policies. Ensure bank account details are accurate and correct prior the transaction to avoid any delay.

limits.heading: Transaction Limits
limits.intro1: mPay enforces transaction limits to protect your account. Your limits depend on many factors like customer type(Consumer or Merchant) and is calculated on a daily, monthly and annual accumulation.
limits.intro2: Here's a sample table limit (these are controlled by mPay Network)
limits.callout_view: View your current limits: Go to Profile Settings → Wallet Limits to see your current limit, usage, and remaining limits for the day/month.
limits.callout_increase: Increasing your limit? Contact mPay Support for this request and is subject for review and approval.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does it take for my top-up to appear?
faq.a1: Card top-ups appear instantly. Bank transfers typically take 1–2 business days, depending on your bank. Cash agent top-ups are also instant once confirmed by the agent. You'll receive a push notification as soon as the funds are credited.
faq.q2: Can I withdraw money to someone else's bank account?
faq.a2: No. For security reasons, withdrawals can only be made to bank accounts registered in the same name as your MPay account. This is a regulatory requirement to prevent fraud and money laundering. If you need to send money to someone else, use the P2P Transfer feature instead.
faq.q3: What happens if I exceed my transaction limit?
faq.a3: The transaction will be declined, and you'll see an error message explaining that you've reached your limit. You can either wait for the limit to reset (daily limits reset at midnight UTC, monthly limits on the 1st of each month) or upgrade your verification tier to get higher limits.
faq.q4: Is there a fee for maintaining a wallet balance?
faq.a4: No. There are no monthly fees, maintenance charges, or inactivity fees for your MPay wallet. Your balance stays yours. The only fees that may apply are for certain top-up methods (credit card top-ups) and express/instant withdrawals.
faq.q5: Can I set up recurring/automatic top-ups?
faq.a5: Yes! Go to Settings → Auto Top-Up to configure automatic balance replenishment. You can set a minimum balance threshold and a top-up amount. When your balance drops below the threshold, MPay will automatically top up from your preferred funding source.
faq.q6: What happens to my balance if I lose my phone?
faq.a6: Your balance is safe — it's stored securely on MPay servers, not on your device. If you lose your phone, immediately contact MPay support to freeze your account. Then, when you get a new device, log in with your credentials and your full balance will be restored. Enable remote wipe on your phone as an extra precaution.

p2p_transfers.title: Sending and Receiving Money
p2p_transfers.subtitle: Send, receive, and request money instantly from anyone in the mPay Network. Sending and receiving money is fast, secure, and fee-free for standard transactions.

send.title: Send Money
send.desc: Transfer funds to any mPay user instantly, fast and secured.

receive.title: Receive Money
receive.desc: Accept transfers via QR code or email or mobile number.

request.title: Request Payment
request.desc: Send payment requests to other users by generating QR

send.heading: Sending Money
send.intro_body: Send money to anyone on the mPay Network in seconds. You can send via username, phone number, or QR code — whichever is most convenient.

send_email_mobile.title: Send by E-mail or Mobile Number
send_email_mobile.intro: The newest way to send money is by searching for the recipient using their mPay email or mobile number.

1.title: Launch the "Pay to E-mail or Pay to Mobile"
1.body: From the home screen, tap the either the "Pay to Email" or "Pay to Mobile" icon.

2.title: Find the Recipient
2.body: Enter the recipient's mPay e-mail or mobile number in the search field. The app will show matching users in real-time. You can also select from your Recent Contacts or Favorites list.

3.title: Enter the Amount
3.body: Type the amount you want to send. The app will display your wallet's current balance. You can optionally add a note or memo in Description field (e.g., Dinner split).

4.title: Review and Confirm
4.body: Review the transfer details including recipient, amount, and any fees. Tap Confirm & Send and authenticate with your PIN or biometric.

5.title: Transfer Complete
5.body: You'll see a confirmation screen with a transaction reference number. The recipient is notified instantly.

send_gallery.title: Send by Scan from Gallery
send_gallery.intro: One convenient way of sending money using saved QR code on your phone gallery

1.title: Launch the "Scan from Gallery"
1.body: From the home screen, tap the Scan from Gallery icon.

2.title: Upload the QR code on your gallery
2.body: The sender can upload the recipient’s QR code from the mobile phone’s gallery to initiate the transaction.

3.title: Enter the Amount
3.body: Type the amount you want to send. The app will display your wallet's current balance. You can optionally add a note or memo in Description field (e.g., Payment for clothes).

4.title: Review and Confirm
4.body: Review the transfer details including recipient, amount, and any fees. Tap Confirm & Send and authenticate with your PIN or biometric.

5.title: Transfer Complete
5.body: You'll see a confirmation screen with a transaction reference number. The recipient is notified instantly.

send_scan_pay.title: Send via Scan to Pay
send_scan_pay.intro: Scan to Pay allows users to scan a QR code to quickly send money or make payments using their wallet.

1.title: Tap "Scan to Pay"
1.body: From the home screen, tap the Scan to Pay icon in the Send Money section.

2.title: Scan the Recipient's QR Code
2.body: Point your camera at the recipient's QR code. Once scanned, the recipient's details will automatically populated in Scan to Pay form.

3.title: Enter Amount and Confirm
3.body: Enter the transfer amount, review the details, and confirm with your PIN or biometric authentication.

4.title: Transfer Complete
4.body:
You'll see a confirmation screen with a transaction reference number.

The recipient is notified instantly.

send_pay_qr.title: Send via Pay by QR
send_pay_qr.intro: Pay by QR allows users to generate a QR code that the recipient can scan to receive money.

1.title: Tap "Pay by QR"
1.body: From the home screen, tap the Pay by QR icon in the Send Money section.

2.title: Enter QR details
2.body: Users can define the amount, usage type (one-time or multiple), and expiry when generating a Pay by QR code.

3.title: Review and Confirm
3.body: Review the details, and confirm with your PIN or biometric authentication.

4.title: Transfer Complete
4.body:
You'll see a confirmation screen with a transaction reference number.

The recipient is notified instantly.

limits.title: Transaction Limits
limits.desc: Transaction limits depend on what has been setup in Admin Console which could be a global limit or user-level limit.

callout.title: Important
callout.body: User transaction limits are defined and controlled by the mPay Network and cannot be modified within the application. However, customer can view their accumulated limits in Profile Settings → Payment Limits

receive.heading: Receiving Money
receive.intro_body: When someone sends you money, it arrives in your wallet instantly. You'll receive a push notification and the amount is immediately available to spend.

notifications.title: Transfer Notifications
notifications.intro: When a transfer or payment is is sent to your wallet account, you'll receive:

list.push: Push notification — Shows sender name, amount, and memo
list.in_app: In-app notification — Available in the Notifications center
list.email: Email notification — If enabled in your notification settings
list.sms: SMS alert — Transaction alert to your registered mobile number

share_qr.title: Share Your Profile QR Code
share_qr.intro: Make it easy for others to send you money by sharing your profile QR code:

1.title: Open Your QR Code
1.body: From the home screen, tap the Profile QR Code in the upper right corner of the page.

2.title: Share or Display
2.body: Show the QR code on your screen for the sender to scan, or tap Share to send it via message, email, or social media.

share_qr.placeholder: Personal QR Code screen with amount field

fees_callout.title: No Fees for Receiving
fees_callout.body: Receiving P2P transfers on MPay Network is always free. There are no fees for incoming standard transfers.

request.heading: Requesting Money
request.intro_body: Need to collect money from a friend or split a bill? Send a payment request directly from the app. The recipient gets a notification and can pay with a single tap.

1.title: Open Request Screen
1.body: From the home screen, tap Request by QR in the Receive Money section.

2.title: Set the Amount and Details
2.body: Enter the total amount and add a description (e.g., Dinner at La Piazza - March 15).

3.title: Tap Submit to generate QR
3.body: Click on Submit button to generate a customized QR code.

4.title: Share the QR to the Sender
4.body:
Share the QR code generated to the Sender.

The sender will then send money using this QR via Scan to Pay.

respond_qr.title: Responding to a Request by QR
respond_qr.intro: When someone sends you a Request by QR code, you being the Sender can send the money or pay using Scan to Pay or Scan from Gallery.

1.title: Review the Request
1.body: Is the person requesting money from you someone you trust?

2.title: Send Money
2.body: Sender can use to pay the Request by QR code using either Scan to Pay or Scan from Gallery.

3.title: Verify and Authenticate
3.body: Confirm the transaction with your PIN or biometric authentication. The money is transferred immediately.

tip_callout.title: Sending Money Pro Tip
tip_callout.body: Always verify the requestor before sending payment to avoid potential fraud.

fraud_callout.title: Fraud Warning
fraud_callout.body: Never pay a request from someone you don't know. If you receive an unexpected payment request, verify the sender before paying. Report suspicious requests to fraud@mpaynetwork.com.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, standard P2P transfers between MPay wallet users are completely free. There are no fees for sending or receiving money. However, instant transfers to external bank accounts may incur a small fee (typically 1-2%).
faq.q2: How long does a P2P transfer take?
faq.a2: P2P transfers between MPay users are instant — the money appears in the recipient's wallet within seconds. In rare cases during high traffic, transfers may take up to 30 seconds to process.
faq.q3: Can I cancel a P2P transfer after sending?
faq.a3: Once a P2P transfer is confirmed and sent, it cannot be reversed. If you sent money to the wrong person, you can contact the recipient through the app to request they send it back. You can also open a dispute through Help → Report a Problem within 24 hours.
faq.q4: Can I send money to someone who doesn't have MPay?
faq.a4: You can invite non-MPay users to receive transfers. When you send money to a phone number not registered on MPay, the recipient receives an SMS with a link to download the app and claim the funds. Unclaimed transfers expire after 14 days and are automatically refunded.
faq.q5: How do I increase my transfer limits?
faq.a5:
Transfer limits are tied to your account verification level. To increase your limits:

1. Go to Settings → Account → Verification.
2. Complete the required verification steps for the next level.
3. Limits are updated automatically once verification is approved (typically within 24 hours).
faq.q6: What happens if I send money to the wrong person?
faq.a6:
If you accidentally send money to the wrong recipient, you should:

1. Contact the recipient through the app's in-built messaging feature to request a return.
2. If the recipient is unresponsive, file a dispute within 24 hours through Help → Report a Problem → Wrong Recipient.
3. Our support team will mediate the situation. Please note that we cannot guarantee recovery of funds sent to the wrong person.

Always double-check the recipient's name and profile picture before confirming a transfer.
faq.q7: Can I schedule recurring P2P transfers?
faq.a7: Yes! You can set up recurring transfers for rent payments, allowances, or regular payments. After entering the transfer details, toggle on Make Recurring and choose your frequency (weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly). You can manage or cancel recurring transfers in Transfers → Scheduled.

settings.title: Settings & Security
settings.subtitle: Learn how to configure your MPay Consumer Wallet settings, manage security preferences, enable biometric authentication, and protect your account with advanced security features.

visual.title: Your Security Matters
visual.body: MPay uses bank-grade encryption and multiple security layers to keep your wallet and transactions safe. Configure these settings to maximize your protection.

pin.heading: PIN Management
pin.intro: Your transaction PIN is a 6-digit code used to authorize payments and sensitive account operations. It is separate from your device lock screen and provides an additional layer of security.
pin.setting_intro: When you first set up your mPay wallet, you'll be prompted to create a transaction PIN. Follow these steps:

1.title: Navigate to Security Settings
1.desc: Open the app menu and tap Profile Settings → Security → Change PIN.

2.title: Enter a 6-Digit PIN
2.desc: Choose a PIN that you can remember but that isn't easily guessable. Avoid sequential numbers like 123456 or repeated digits like 111111.

3.title: Confirm Your PIN
3.desc: Re-enter your PIN to confirm. The system will verify both entries match before saving.

4.title: PIN Saved Successfully
4.desc: Your PIN is now active. You'll use it to approve transactions, transfers, and account changes.

pin.changing_intro: To change your existing PIN, you'll need to verify your current PIN first:

1.title: Go to Settings → Security → Change PIN
1.desc: Navigate to the PIN management section in your security settings.

2.title: Enter Current PIN
2.desc: Verify your identity by entering your current 6-digit PIN.

3.title: Enter & Confirm New PIN
3.desc: Type your new PIN and confirm it. Your new PIN takes effect immediately.

pin.tips_body: Never share your PIN with anyone, including MPay support staff. MPay will never ask you for your PIN via phone, email, or SMS. After 5 failed PIN attempts, your account will be temporarily locked for 30 minutes.
pin.forgot_body: If you forget your transaction PIN, tap "Forgot PIN" on the PIN entry screen. You'll need to verify your identity through your registered email or phone number to reset it.

biometric.heading: Biometric Authentication
biometric.intro: Enable fingerprint or Face ID authentication for quick and secure access to your wallet. Biometric login adds convenience while maintaining strong security.

fingerprint.title: Fingerprint
fingerprint.desc: Use your registered fingerprint for fast wallet access and transaction approval.

faceid.title: Face ID
faceid.desc: Authenticate with facial recognition for a seamless hands-free experience.

2.title: Toggle Biometric Login
2.desc: Turn on the biometric authentication toggle. Your device must have at least one fingerprint or Face ID enrolled.

3.title: Verify with PIN
3.desc: Enter your transaction PIN to confirm the change. This ensures only you can enable biometrics.

4.title: Test Your Biometric
4.desc: You'll be prompted to scan your fingerprint or face to verify it works correctly.

biometric.requirements_body: Biometric authentication requires a compatible device with enrolled biometrics. If your device doesn't support biometrics, this option will be unavailable. You can always fall back to PIN authentication.

notifications.heading: Notification Settings
notifications.intro: Configure how and when MPay sends you alerts about transactions, security events, and account activity. Keeping notifications enabled helps you monitor your account in real time.

push.title: Push Notifications
push.desc: Real-time alerts delivered directly to your device. Recommended for transaction alerts and security notifications.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.desc: Detailed notifications sent to your registered email address. Includes transaction receipts and monthly summaries.

sms.title: SMS Alerts
sms.desc: Critical alerts via text message. Used for high-value transactions and security events when push is unavailable.

types.transaction: Transaction Alerts — Every payment sent or received
types.summary: Weekly Summary — Weekly spending and activity digest

notifications.pro_tip_body: We recommend keeping Transaction Alerts and Security Alerts enabled at all times. These help you quickly detect unauthorized activity on your account.
notifications.managing_body: To adjust your notification preferences, navigate to Settings → Notifications. Use the toggles to enable or disable each notification type per channel. Changes take effect immediately.

privacy.heading: Privacy Settings
privacy.intro: MPay gives you full control over your personal data and privacy preferences. Manage how your information is used, shared, and stored.

visibility.title: Profile Visibility
visibility.desc: Control who can see your display name and profile picture when sending or receiving payments.

analytics.title: Analytics & Usage Data
analytics.desc: Choose whether to share anonymized usage data to help improve the MPay experience.

location.title: Location Data
location.desc: Manage location access. Used for fraud detection and nearby merchant features.

contacts.title: Contacts Access
contacts.desc: Allow MPay to access your contacts for easy P2P transfers. Fully optional.

privacy.data_intro: You have the right to access, export, and delete your personal data at any time:

export.title: Export Data
export.desc: Download a copy of all your personal data and transaction history

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.desc: Review a complete log of account activity and access events

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

privacy.deletion_body: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Before deleting, ensure your wallet balance is zero and all pending transactions are completed. Regulatory requirements may require us to retain certain transaction records for up to 7 years.
privacy.policy_body: For complete details on how MPay collects, uses, and protects your data, please review our Privacy Policy.

1.q: What happens if I forget my transaction PIN?
1.a: Tap "Forgot PIN" on the PIN entry screen. You'll need to verify your identity through your registered email or phone number. A PIN reset link will be sent to you. After verification, you can set a new 6-digit PIN. Your account may be temporarily restricted during the reset process for security.

2.q: Can I use both fingerprint and Face ID?
2.a: You can only use the biometric method supported by your device. Most devices support either fingerprint or Face ID, not both simultaneously. If your device supports both, you can choose which one to use as your primary biometric method in the security settings.

3.q: How do I recover my account if I lose my 2FA device?
3.a: Use one of your backup codes to log in and disable 2FA. If you don't have backup codes, contact MPay support with your registered email and a government-issued ID for identity verification. The recovery process typically takes 24-48 hours for security reasons.

4.q: Why am I not receiving push notifications?
4.a: First, check that notifications are enabled in both the MPay app settings and your device's system settings. On Android, ensure the app isn't being restricted by battery optimization. On iOS, check the Notification Center settings. If notifications still aren't working, try logging out and back in, or reinstalling the app.

5.q: Can I download my transaction history?
5.a: Yes! Go to Settings → Privacy → Export Data to download a complete copy of your transaction history. You can export in CSV or PDF format. The export will be sent to your registered email address and typically arrives within a few minutes.

6.q: Is my PIN stored on MPay servers?
6.a: No. Your PIN is never stored in plain text. MPay uses strong one-way hashing (bcrypt) to store a hashed version of your PIN. This means even MPay employees cannot see your actual PIN. All PIN verification happens securely server-side by comparing hashes.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.subtitle: Find solutions to common issues, understand error codes, and learn how to resolve problems with your MPay Consumer Wallet.
troubleshooting.search_placeholder: Search issues, error codes, and FAQs...

diagnostic.title: Quick Diagnostic Tool
diagnostic.intro: Run a quick check to identify potential issues with your wallet setup. This diagnostic verifies common configuration points.

common_issues.title: Common Issues
common_issues.desc: Below are the most frequently encountered problems and their step-by-step solutions.

issue1.title: Unable to Connect to Server
issue1.summary: App shows "Connection Error" or takes too long to load.
issue1.cause1: Unstable internet connection (Wi-Fi or mobile data)
issue1.cause2: MPay Network servers may be undergoing maintenance
issue1.step1: Check your internet connection by opening a web page in your browser.
issue1.step2: Toggle airplane mode on and off, then retry.
issue1.step3: Disable any VPN or proxy services temporarily.
issue1.step4: Update the MPay Consumer Wallet app from your app store.
issue1.step5: If the issue persists, check MPay Status Page for ongoing incidents.
issue1.callout: Server maintenance typically lasts 15-30 minutes and is scheduled during off-peak hours (2:00 AM — 4:00 AM local time).

issue2.title: QR Code Not Scanning
issue2.summary: Camera unable to detect or read merchant QR codes.
issue2.cause1: Camera permission not granted to the app
issue2.cause4: Camera lens is dirty or obstructed
issue2.step1: Go to Settings → App Permissions and ensure camera access is enabled for MPay.
issue2.step2: Clean your camera lens with a soft cloth.
issue2.step3: Ensure adequate lighting — use the flashlight toggle in the scanner view.
issue2.step4: Hold your phone steady, about 6-12 inches from the QR code.
issue2.step5: If the QR code is on a screen, reduce screen glare by adjusting the angle.
issue2.callout: If the QR code appears damaged or corrupted, ask the merchant to regenerate a new one.

issue3.title: NFC Payment Failing
issue3.summary: Tap-to-pay not detected or transaction not completing.
issue3.cause1: NFC is disabled on your device
issue3.cause2: Phone case is blocking the NFC antenna
issue3.cause3: Device not positioned correctly on the terminal
issue3.step1: Enable NFC in your phone's Settings: Settings → Connected Devices → NFC
issue3.step2: Remove any thick phone case or metal accessories that may block NFC.
issue3.step3: Hold the back of your phone flat against the terminal for 2-3 seconds.
issue3.step4: Ensure your wallet has sufficient balance for the transaction.
issue3.callout: NFC antenna location varies by phone model. Most Android phones have it in the upper-middle back area. iPhones use the top edge.

issue4.title: Biometric Login Not Working
issue4.summary: Fingerprint or face recognition fails to authenticate.
issue4.cause1: Biometric data changed on the device (new fingerprint added)
issue4.cause2: Biometric hardware sensor dirty or damaged
issue4.cause3: Biometric permission revoked for the app
issue4.step1: Log in using your PIN code as a fallback.
issue4.step2: Go to MPay Settings → Security → Biometric Login and re-enable it.
issue4.step3: If prompted, re-register your biometric data.
issue4.step4: Clean the fingerprint sensor or ensure face recognition has clear line of sight.

issue5.title: P2P Transfer Stuck or Pending
issue5.summary: Money sent but recipient hasn't received it.
issue5.step1: Check the transaction status in Activity → Transaction History.
issue5.step2: If status is "Processing", wait up to 30 minutes for completion.
issue5.step3: If status is "Pending Review", your transaction is being reviewed. You'll receive a notification once resolved.
issue5.step4: If stuck for more than 2 hours, contact support with the Transaction ID.
issue5.callout: Do not send the same transfer again while the original is still processing. This may result in a double charge.

issue6.title: Top-Up or Withdrawal Failed
issue6.summary: Unable to add funds or withdraw from wallet.
issue6.cause1: Bank account or card not verified
issue6.step1: Verify your linked bank account/card in Settings → Payment Methods.
issue6.step2: Check your current limits in Settings → Limits.
issue6.step3: Complete KYC verification to unlock higher limits.
issue6.step4: Contact your bank to ensure no holds or blocks on online transactions.

error_codes.title: Error Codes Reference
error_codes.desc: If you encounter an error code in the app, use this reference table to understand what it means and how to resolve it.

e1001.res: Check internet connection and retry. Switch between Wi-Fi and mobile data.

e1002.res: Re-enter your credentials. If persists, reset password via email recovery.

e1003.res: Log in again. This is normal after 30 minutes of inactivity.

e2001.res: Top up your wallet before retrying the transaction.

e2002.res: You've reached your daily/monthly limit. Complete KYC for higher limits or wait for reset.

e2003.res: The merchant's terminal rejected the payment. Verify amount and retry, or use a different payment method.

e2004.res: The system detected a possible duplicate. Check your transaction history before retrying.

e3001.res: Ask the merchant to generate a new QR code. QR codes expire after 5 minutes.

e3002.res: Your device doesn't support NFC. Use QR code scanning for payments instead.

e4001.res: Your account has been temporarily suspended. Contact support immediately for resolution.

e4002.res: Complete identity verification in Settings → Account → Verify Identity.

e5001.res: Verify your linked bank/card details. Contact your bank if the issue continues.

e5002.res: Withdrawals may take 1-3 business days. No action needed unless it exceeds 5 days.

e9999.res: An unexpected error occurred. Restart the app and retry. If persists, contact support.

error_codes.callout: You can find your error code by tapping the error message in the app. The code appears at the bottom of the error dialog. Include this code when contacting support for faster resolution.

contact_support.title: Contact Support
contact_support.desc: If you can't resolve your issue using the guides above, our support team is here to help.

ticket.title: Support Ticket
ticket.desc: Submit a detailed support request and get a response within 24 hours.

email.title: Email Us
email.desc: Send an email to our support team for complex issues or account inquiries.

chat.title: In-App Chat
chat.desc: Use the built-in chat feature for real-time assistance during business hours.

contact_support.checklist_title: Before contacting support, please have the following ready:
contact_support.check1: Your registered email address or phone number

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Quick answers to the most common questions about the Consumer Wallet.
faq.q1: How do I reset my wallet PIN?
faq.a1:
Go to Settings → Security → Change PIN. You'll need to verify your identity using your registered email or phone number first. Enter your current PIN (or use the "Forgot PIN" option), then set a new 6-digit PIN.

If you've forgotten your PIN entirely, tap "Forgot PIN" on the login screen and follow the recovery steps. You'll receive a verification code via SMS or email.
faq.q2: Can I use MPay Wallet on multiple devices?
faq.a2:
For security purposes, your MPay Consumer Wallet can only be active on one device at a time. If you log in on a new device, your previous session will be automatically ended.

To switch devices, simply install the app on your new device, log in with your credentials, and verify your identity. All your data will sync automatically.
faq.q3: What are the daily transaction limits?
faq.a3:
Transaction limits depend on your verification level:

  • Basic (unverified): $100/day, $500/month
  • Verified (KYC complete): $5,000/day, $25,000/month
  • Premium: $25,000/day, $100,000/month

You can check your current limits and verification level in Settings → Account → Limits.
faq.q4: How long do refunds take to process?
faq.a4:
Refunds initiated by merchants typically appear in your wallet within 1-3 business days. You'll receive a push notification when the refund is credited. For refunds to your linked bank account, allow an additional 3-5 business days.

You can track refund status in Activity → Transaction History — refunded transactions are marked with a green "Refunded" badge.
faq.q5: Why is my account showing "Under Review"?
faq.a5:
Account reviews are triggered automatically by our security system when unusual activity is detected. This may happen if:

  • Multiple failed login attempts
  • Large or unusual transaction patterns
  • Login from a new location or device
  • Incomplete KYC verification

Reviews typically complete within 24-48 hours. During review, you can still view your balance and history, but transactions may be temporarily restricted. Contact support if the review takes longer than expected.
faq.q6: How do I delete my account permanently?
faq.a6:
To delete your account, go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. Before deletion, you must:

  • Withdraw all remaining balance to your bank account
  • Ensure no pending transactions exist
  • Confirm your identity via email/phone verification

Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Your transaction history will be retained for 7 years as required by financial regulations, but your personal profile will be anonymized.

features.secure_desc: Bank-grade encryption, multi-factor authentication, and real-time fraud detection to keep your money safe.
features.multilingual_desc: Available in English, Spanish, French, Dutch, and Papiamentu. Reach a wider audience with localized experiences.
